ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price for the day */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the day */,
  "split_adjusted_close" REAL /* Closing price adjusted for stock splits */,
  "dividend_adjusted_close" REAL /* Closing price adjusted for dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key value */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "report" TEXT /* Textual report containing analysis insights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being assessed */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk assessment */,
  "risk_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the dividend is declared */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was declared */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of dividend paid per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that underwent a split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the index */,
  "base_year" INTEGER /* Base year for index calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index the stock is part of */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that is a component of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtest_results" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy being backtested */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest period */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns generated by the strategy during the backtest period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the market holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)
